title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker20: hal.c
close_reason: Removed erroneous duty-cycle implementation that was merged into hal.c in worktree-worker20 (85 lines of prune/total_airtime/lichen_duty_cycle_* functions that belong in a dedicated module or the Rust equivalent). Synced clean hal.c from main. Commit 32efeab69.
